buttons.addTooltip: Add this category to your custom collection

categories.title: Categories
categories.minimumRequired: Add categories to your deck to play.
categories.emptyDeck: The deck is empty. Add a pack or a custom category.

modal.title: How to play
modal.objectiveText: Score points by writing words that fit each category and start with the drawn letter.
gameplayPoints: A random letter is drawn — every answer must start with it.
Before the timer runs out (90 seconds by default), write one word for each category.
Use a different word for each category, with no repeats across your list.
Playing with others? Score 1 point for each answer nobody else wrote; matching answers score 0, so aim for creative, uncommon words.
modal.categoriesText: This tool draws categories from the official Scattergories game. You can also create custom categories and mix them with the defaults.
modal.settingsIntro: Find these at the bottom of the screen — everything saves automatically.
settingsItems: Round timer — how long each round lasts, plus the get-ready countdown before it begins.
Language — change the interface and category language.
Sound — mute or unmute the timer ticks and alarm.
Theme — switch between light and dark mode.
modal.privacy: This app stores settings and custom categories in your browser only.

errors.chunkTitle: A fresh app version is ready.
errors.chunkBody: One of the interface chunks changed while the app was open. Reload to continue safely.
errors.boundaryBody: Reload the app to reset the current round and continue playing.
